text: hey mom, still on for dinner sat? thinking that italian place downtown
o yes! 7pm work? i'll book a table
perfect, see u then love u
hey mom, still on for dinner sat? i can grab that italian place if u want
o that sounds good hon, what time were u thinking
6:30? i'll book a table for us + dad
still on for our call sunday? maybe 4pm your time?
yes! 4 works, i'll have the kettle on lol
perfect, talk then love
hii gran, just checking in on u! how u feeling today? xx
o im alright love, bit tired but ok. hows uni going?
good good, busy week but managing! ill call u this weekend a x
hi grandma just checking in on u, how's everything today?
o hello dear! im ok, took my pills already, just resting a bit
good to hear! let me know if u need anything, love u
Hi grandma! just checking in, how are you feeling today?
Hi sweetie, I'm doing okay, a little tired but otherwise good :)
glad to hear it! call me if you need anything, love you
